usecase.name: [Sample App] Validate Home Page
usecase.description: Verify all home page elements render correctly

steps.instruction: Verify the navigation bar exists with 'AnyCompany' logo text
Verify navigation links exist: Home, Blog, Pricing, Contact
Verify hero section contains heading 'Build faster. Scale smarter.'
Verify 'View Pricing' button exists in hero section
Verify 'Contact Us' button exists in hero section
Verify section with heading 'Why teams choose AnyCompany' exists with 4 feature cards
Verify section with heading 'What our customers say' exists with 3 testimonial cards
Verify footer exists with 'AnyCompany' text and quick links
